name: Retrieved Data Attributed (C1)
description: Capability C1 (Retrieval & Attribution): retrieved data must carry provenance and recency checks before it is relied upon.
rationale: Szpruch C1 failure mode: stale data used without flagging, or prompt injection via a retrieved document. The fix is enforceable attribution, not model self-report.

examples.fails: Retrieve of stale data used without a recency flag

source: FIX AI WG — Proposal on Agentic AI Runtime Governance (Healey & Houston, 12 Jun 2026); governance conditions per Szpruch, Sudjianto, Bhatti & Ang (2026), 'Scalable Runtime Governance for Agentic AI in Financial Services'.
